architecture.summary: Bug fix - reorder existing guard functions in init.ts before promptSmartReinit, no new architecture

integrations.summary: No external integrations affected - changes are internal to init command flow

ui-ux.summary: Error messages unchanged, guard order change is transparent to user, suggestedRoot fallback improves UX

performance.summary: No performance impact - same guards, different execution order

security.summary: Prevents data loss by validating before destructive action - security improvement

edge-cases.summary: Handles: macOS symlinked /tmp vs /private/tmp via os.tmpdir(), Windows temp paths, suggestedRoot at filesystem root, suggestedRoot equals homedir
